name: Krutz Family Cellars
tagline: A Sonoma family winery, from 60 cases on
seoDescription: Krutz Family Cellars: a Santa Rosa family winery founded in 2003, handcrafting small-lot, critically-acclaimed wines from prestigious Northern California

sections.heading: A Sonoma family winery since 2003
sections.subheading: Krutz Family Cellars began in 2003 with just 60 cases. Today the family crafts small-lot, critically-acclaimed wines from some of Northern California's most prestigious vineyards — tasted from

sections.heading: About Krutz Family Cellars
body: Krutz Family Cellars started in 2003 with a single, hopeful batch — just 60 cases. In 2011 brothers Bryan and Cole Krutz joined Patrick as owners, and the family and the production have grown together into a small Sonoma County winery built on hands-on, personal winemaking.

The family sources fruit from some of the most prestigious vineyards across Northern California and makes the wine in small lots — work that's earned real recognition, including a 94-point Editor's Choice Syrah and a 93-point Chardonnay from Wine Enthusiast. Visits are personal by design: a reservation brings a one-on-one tour and a taste straight from the barrel.
highlights: Syrah rated 94 points — Wine Enthusiast Editor's Choice
Family winery since 2003, from just 60 cases
Fruit from prestigious Northern California vineyards

items.title: Wine Club
items.description: Join the family to receive new small-lot releases as they're bottled.

items.title: Private Tastings
items.description: Intimate, by-appointment tastings for small groups and special occasions.
